name: unicode_list_literal_casefold_now_claimed
description: #555 Slice 2 — NOW CLAIMED (was a unicode_casefold fallback-boundary guard). list<literal "GRÜN"> against ["grün"]: the element literal match now folds through bamlunicode (Rust str::to_lowercase), so native CLAIMS the element and keeps [GRÜN] — the distinct nested decline site (180 is the standalone literal) is now claimed too. want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
